series_metadata.series_description: Documents relating to the application, grant or denial of, and extension of a flood plain management permit, excepting the development plans that have been approved. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, grants or denials of a permit or extension, foundation drawings, site plans, blocking diagrams, flood plain management permits, and notices of expiring permit.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: record shall be retained one year permit is denied, manufactured home park referenced in permit is closed, or permit expires, whichever is later. ; Paper: If an electronic version of record exists, paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of record does not exist
